detectors.description:
GIFT_FOR_FRIENDS.GetGift() (GIFT_FOR_FRIENDS.sol#67-83) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- reciver == msg.sender && now > unlockTime (GIFT_FOR_FRIENDS.sol#75)
